fixtures.title: Celebrate a personal win
fixtures.sourceText: Synthetic demo post: I finished my first 10K this morning! It rained for most of the route, but the people cheering made every kilometre worth it. Still cannot believe I actually did it.

fixtures.title: Answer a deadline request
fixtures.sourceText: Synthetic demo message: Hi — could you send the revised launch brief by Thursday afternoon? Please include the updated rollout dates and the two open risks so I can review everything before Friday morning.

fixtures.title: Respond to a design tradeoff
fixtures.sourceText: Synthetic demo thread: Caching OCR output might make repeated edits faster, but it also creates another lifecycle for sensitive text. I would keep the screenshot memory-only and optimize the crop pipeline before adding persistence.
